check_content_excerpt:
Devices that have UEFI firmware must run in UEFI mode.

Verify the system firmware is configured to run in UEFI mode, not Legacy BIOS.

Run "System Information".

Under "System Summary", if "BIOS Mode" does not display "UEFI", this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Configure UEFI firmware to run in UEFI mode, not Legacy BIOS mode.
title: Windows Server 2025 systems must have Unified Extensible Firmware Interface (UEFI) firmware and be configured to run in UEFI mode, not Legacy BIOS.
